title: How I Taught Myself to Be a Child
original_title: Wie ich lernte, bei mir selbst Kind zu sein
overview: Paul Silberstein, youngest son of an urbane but deeply strange old Austrian dynasty of confectionery millionaires, discovers the power of love and humor - and also his own extraordinary ability to shape his realities.  Based on the motives of the short story with the same name by André Heller.
